notes: Dormant stub — script scripts/ci/check_lean_best_book_parity.py was landed by PR #29 (perfect-books Wave-1) without this metadata file, causing the Drift-detectors CI step to hard-crash (metadata missing) instead of reporting the intended not-ratified dormant state. This file restores that dormant state per the script's own check_golden_integrity() contract. Operator has not yet read/ratified a lean-best-book golden snapshot.

restoration_protocol.summary: Lean best-book golden activates only after operator reads and ratifies a candidate. Until then this metadata stays status=not_ratified and the CI gate no-ops.
restoration_protocol.ratify_snapshot_change: PR body must include GOLDEN-UPDATE-RATIFIED: <OPD ref>
